title: noccaea procumbens
intro: Noccaea procumbens, also known as creeping thyme-leaved stonecrop, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Noccaea procumbens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Noccaea procumbens can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
